overview: Enablement Quest: The Learning Systems Lab is a top-down RPG-style learning journey where players explore a modern organization, talk to NPCs, complete quests, and collect learning artifacts about workplace enablement.
features: Top-down tile-based game canvas with player movement
Home/base area (The Lab) and hub area (The Commons)
NPC dialogue system with a Learning Architect
Basic quest: Map the Onboarding Flow with waypoints
Learning artifact: Onboarding Blueprint earned on completion
Quest log and artifact inventory panels
